strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js and React product work at scale (Optilyz, RIDE Capital)
Hands-on AI agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong testing and craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus authored test frameworks and taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin exposure absent and Java experience is dated/secondary; Python not listed
Named testing tools (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not explicitly mentioned, though testing expertise is clearly strong
response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with strong, recent experience in the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes) and directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure work, which is a required and rare skill. A deep testing and software-craftsmanship background fits the quality-focused responsibilities well. Gaps are framework-specific (Nest.js) and secondary-language (Kotlin/Python) rather than fundamental, and his polyglot history (D, C++, Java, Swift) suggests fast ramp-up. Overall a strong fit for a senior IC role on internal automation tooling.
